pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"在-cabal-中初次使用","children":"在 cabal 中初次使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["先执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"cabal update"}]]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["待生成 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.cabal/config"}]," 配置文件之后 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"Ctrl+C"}]," , 然后进行下一步。（注：在 Windows 平台上的配置文件是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\cabal\config"}]," ）"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"cabal-124-ghc-80","children":"Cabal 1.2.4 (GHC 8.0)"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.cabal/config"}]," ，加入"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","filepath":"~/.cabal/config","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"为了访问速度，可以选择把官方仓库注释掉："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"cabal-小于-124","children":"Cabal 小于 1.2.4"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.cabal/config"}],", 将此行"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"注释掉，改为"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注意，此处的注释是两条短线 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"--"}]," ."]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["再执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"cabal update"}]," , 即可使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"cabal"}]," 安装包了。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"在-stack-中使用","children":"在 stack 中使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["本镜像推荐与",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../stackage/","children":"Stackage 镜像"}],"配合使用。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack-大于等于-v293","children":"stack 大于等于 v2.9.3"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}],", 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"yaml","filepath":"~/.stack/config.yaml","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack-大于等于-v211","children":"stack 大于等于 v2.1.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}]," , 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"yaml","filepath":"~/.stack/config.yaml","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stack-小于-v211","children":"stack 小于 v2.1.1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/config.yaml"}]," , 加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"yaml","filepath":"~/.stack/config.yaml","enableQuickSetup":true}]]}]
